oil_supply_shock_driver.note: Hormuz flows ~4M bpd (vs normal 16M); Brent peaked $126/bbl; EIA Q2 2026 avg $91/bbl; 5yr breakeven +26bps since conflict onset; Fed and ECB both citing energy as primary inflation driver
oil_supply_shock_driver.resolution_criteria: AIS-confirmed resumption of commercial crossings; geopolitical premium drops below $5/bbl

version_history.change: Initial driver set to Iran conflict / Hormuz restriction
version_history.reason: Zero AIS crossings confirmed by Windward Maritime Intelligence

version_history.change: Oil shock materially escalated: Brent peaked $126/bbl, Hormuz flows at 25% of normal, Gulf producers cutting 10M bpd
version_history.reason: EIA STEO March 2026; JPMorgan; Reuters; intellectia.ai — confirmed largest supply disruption in history
version_history.prior_value: $15–20 USD/barrel geopolitical premium; zero AIS commercial crossings as of March 14, 2026

blind_spot_overrides.warning: Score may be suppressed by buyback distortion and non-GAAP adjustments. Watch Q2 guidance season.

version_history.reason: Indicator reading +12.5% Q1 est. but structurally suppressed

blind_spot_overrides.warning: Nominal M2 expansion is thinning in real terms. Forward Real M2 may turn negative by Q3 2026.

conviction_history.rationale: All eight asset classes negative; zero bullish scores; stagflation confirmed by growth and inflation data

All 8 asset classes negative (issue 2). No tactical alerts (all deltas < 0.45). Liberation Day tariffs, private credit gate events, consumer confidence 53.3 all confirmed. EM Equities improved +0.19 on FX swap basis but Liberation Day tariffs likely to reverse this.

All 8 asset classes negative; 6 BEARISH, 2 MILD NEGATIVE. Liberation Day tariff cascade T3 active; dollar_weaponization and treasury_market_liquidity upgraded to WARNING. System average crossed CRITICAL threshold (<-0.50).

tariff_escalation_protocol.activation_reason: Liberation Day tariff package — effective US tariff rate exceeds 15%, disputes active with EU/CN/CA/MX simultaneously
tariff_escalation_protocol.current_rung_basis: Enacted + active retaliation by multiple major partners

imf_weo_status.note: IMF WEO April 2026 expected mid-April. When published: update SA indicators, check fragile frontier sovereigns, assess tariff growth impact.

blind_spots.name: Tariff-driven earnings beats
blind_spots.description: Companies with US domestic revenue reporting beats due to tariff shelter, not operational improvement. Apply during active tariff protocol to Tech and Consumer Staples.

blind_spots.name: European defence spending as growth signal
blind_spots.description: Defence spending on imported platforms has limited EU growth multiplier. Disaggregate European vs. US/imported procurement before scoring as macro positive.

blind_spots.name: Tariff-era earnings season distortion
blind_spots.description: Q1 earnings pre-date Liberation Day impact. Pre-tariff beats may appear in early April reports. Guidance revisions for Q2 are the real signal. Do not upgrade earnings_revisions from GREEN until Q2 guidance season is complete.
